memoryArtifacts.headline: Stained glass in Holy Trinity Church, Long Melford, Suffolk - Left, Elizabeth Tilney. Right: Agnes Tilney, On her kirtle, she displays her paternal arms Tilney/by mantle the 1/4 arms Howard. Below: Latin2Eng: "Elizabeth born Tilney wife of Thomas Howard"
AGNES HOWARD, DUCHESS OF NORFOLK
memoryArtifacts.description: Agnes Howard (née Tilney) (c. 1477 – May 1545) was the second wife of Thomas Howard, 2nd Duke of Norfolk. Two of King Henry VIII's queens were her step-granddaughters, Anne Boleyn and Katherine Howard …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey於1477年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯吉爾貝可時，她的父親Sir Hugh Tilney61歲，母親Eleanor Tailboys44歲。她於1497年8月17日與Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1545年11月9日在英國諾福爾可特福德享年68歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey于1477年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯吉爾貝可时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Tilney61岁，母亲Eleanor Tailboys44岁。她于1497年8月17日与Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1545年11月9日在英国諾福爾可特福德享年68岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Tilney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Tilney (Norfolk), which derives its name from the Old English personal name Tila, Tilla (genitive Tilan, Tillan) + Old English ēg ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey was born in 1477, in Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Hugh Tilney, was 61 and her mother, Eleanor Tailboys, was 44. She married Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard on 17 August 1497, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 9 November 1545, in Thetford, Norfolk, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Thetford, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey est née en 1477, à Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Tilney, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Tailboys, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard le 17 août 1497, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 novembre 1545, à Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey 1477 in Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Tilney 61 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Tailboys 44. Sie hat am 17. August 1497 in England Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. November 1545 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Thetford, Norfolk, England und wurde in Thetford, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey è nata il nel 1477 nel Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Sir Hugh Tilney, aveva 61 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Tailboys, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard il 17 agosto 1497, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 novembre 1545, nel Thetford, Norfolk, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Thetford, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surreyが1477年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスキルベックで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Tilneyは61歳，母Eleanor Tailboysは44歳であった。1497年8月17日にイギリスでThomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1545年11月9日にイギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードで68歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey(이)가 1477년 영국 링코실르 스커벡에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Tilney(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Tailboys(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1497년 8월 17일 영국에서 Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 11월 9일 영국 노르폴크 테트퍼드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 테트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey nasceu em 1477, em Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Tilney, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Tailboys, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard em 17 de agosto de 1497, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1545, em Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey родилась в 1477 г. в местности скирбекк, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Tilney было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Tailboys, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard 17 августа 1497 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 9 ноября 1545 г. в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия.

Se casó con Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard el 17 de agosto de 1497, en Inglaterra.
